citations.desc: Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors).
citations.narrative:
The facility did not perform complete daily observation of all animals to assess their health and well-being.
The inspectors observed an adult, one year old female dog [VWE5] with a skin condition. The dog had many circular
areas of hair loss on the outside of both ears and mild crusting on the tip of the right ear. The hair on the inside of both
ears was also patchy. Some of the skin in these hairless areas was red and crusted. The dog also had two areas of moist
red hair loss on the left front paw (about 5mm in diameter).
According to facility representatives, this condition was not identified prior to the inspection. This has prevented the
attending veterinarian from the opportunity to provide medical care for the animal.
Correct by arranging for the Attending Veterinarian to evaluate this animal and ensuring the facility is performing daily
observation of all animals to assess their health and well-being.
The facility instituted corrective actions at the time of inspection.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives.
Additional Inspectors:
William Janecke, Veterinary Medical Officer n

narrative:
2.40(b)(3) 
   
Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors). 
The facility did not perform complete daily observation of all animals to assess their health and well-being. 
 
The inspectors observed an adult, one year old female dog [VWE5] with a skin condition. The dog had many circular

Correct by arranging for the Attending Veterinarian to evaluate this animal and ensuring the facility is performing daily
